function k(k)return m[k-(672089-659647)]end for k,p in ipairs({{535809+-535808,271521+-268995};{-713971+713972,-888514+889446},{570926-569993;3828-1302}})do while p[346646-346645]<p[-460131+460133]do N=function()return p(m,{},k,v)end return N end,function(m)for k=-31571+31572,#m,890443-890442 do z[m[k]]=z[m[k]]+(236408-236407)end if N then local p=N(true)local v=U(p)v[k(349275-336346)],v[k(978450-964350)],v[k(760110+-745782)]=m,Q,function()return-718790-(-785403)end return p else return P({},{[k(-855205+869305)]=Q;[k(-644248-(-657177))]=m;[k(-450002-(-464330))]=function()return 476245-409632 end})end end,function(m,k)local v=f(k)local N=function(N)return p(m,{N},k,v)end return N end,{},function(m)local k,p=-554349-(-554350),m[824697-824696]while p do z[p],k=z[p]-(-833711-(-833712)),(700907-700906)+k if z[p]==-200131+200131 then z[p],M[p]=nil,nil end p=m[k]end end,function(m,k)local v=f(k)local N=function(N,P,U,C,T,M)return p(m,{N,P;U;C,T;M},k,v)end return N end return(g(14957013-(-93139),{}))(v(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[k(-165782+179316)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
